description: Goal: collapse the old model fully once the new contract is live. Delete obsolete callable-constructor tests, side-table helpers, and comments that describe captures as prepended call arguments. Re-baseline the focused fixture set and verify the full workspace. Acceptance: no compiler2/native test still asserts callable constructor body-id vectors; docs describe callable boundaries, separate arg/capture ABI, and direct-vs-opaque closure calls; cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings and cargo test --workspace pass.
title: Remove legacy callable-constructor reconstruction and retire closure regression debt
